rationale: AAVE shows strong on-chain fundamentals: $42.3B TVL (+45% YoY), 59.79% DeFi lending market share, V4 launched Mar 2026. Smart money 59.3% long bias, top-100 concentration rising to 80.36% via accumulation. Anti-GHO buyback ($1M/wk) + 100% revenue-to-DAO create deflationary mechanics. 19.6k stkAAVE holders ($269M staked). Wash trade risk minimal. Headwinds: rising CEX reserves (2.23M tokens, short-term sell risk), contributor exodus (Chaos Labs, BGD, ACI), KelpDAO exploit disruption. No DAU/MAU data available but protocol usage is institutional-grade. Long-term exchange supply % fell from 40% to 28.8%, supporting structural outflow thesis.
